Points.$Comment: Lower the In, to decrease cluster size

Inputs.$Comment: A semi-magic number to center the warp around our height, roughly around 100Y on the global height

$Comments.$text: Warp the terrain to meet the heightmap (roughly)
3 Sizes, the lower they get, the bigger they are
Used to mask stalactites, as to not spawn everywhere, but rather in clusters
Prevent big guys getting stuck maybe
